assassin's_creed_revelations.notes:
Performance Notes

- Average performance: 25–30 FPS.
- If you get a Ubisoft Launcher error, install it from the Start Menu (it's included).
- Do not change any container settings. The container is already configured for the best balance of performance and compatibility.
- Changing the FEXCore version or Performance preset may reduce performance or cause physics issues. For the best experience, use the container exactly as provided.

batman_arkham_city_-_game_of_the_year_ed.notes:
Performance Notes

- Average performance: 25–30 FPS.
- To reduce stuttering, move the game to the C: drive.
- Need To Install Gecko,Mono and Nvdia Physx ,install Them from the Start Menu (All included).
- "PLAYED ON GOG STORE VERSION OF THE GAME".

fifa_14.notes:
Performance Notes

Average performance: 60+ FPS.

Gecko and Mono must be installed, or FIFA Setup will not open. You can install both from the Start Menu.

Do not change the Box64 version or preset. The container is already configured for the best performance and compatibility. Changing these settings may reduce performance or introduce issues.
